name: kast-eval-copilot-sdk-runner
description: Evaluation runner that uses the @github/copilot-sdk to exercise kast_* tools in a real Copilot session.

scripts.test: node tests/test-kast-tools.mjs && node tests/test-run-artifacts.mjs && node tests/test-mock-backend.mjs && node tests/test-run-one-config.mjs
